videos.headline: Mike Hollins scores first TD since UVA tragedy
videos.description: In the University of Virginia's first home game since last year's shooting, Mike Hollins goes over for an emotional touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mike Hollins scores first TD since UVA tragedy) 2023/09/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Virginia honors slain football players with pregame ceremony
videos.description: The University of Virginia honors Devin Chandler, Lavel Davis Jr., D'Sean Perry with a ceremony ahead of game against James Madison.
